ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electrical component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the component specification */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specification details */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES specifications ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "vref_value" TEXT /* Reference voltage value */,
  "v_min" REAL /* Minimum voltage tolerance */,
  "ideal_v" REAL /* Ideal voltage */,
  "v_max" REAL /* Maximum voltage tolerance */,
  "i_min" REAL /* Minimum current tolerance */,
  "i_ideal" REAL /* Ideal current */,
  "i_max" REAL /* Maximum current tolerance */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "tolerance_units" TEXT /* Units for voltage and current tolerances */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_records" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for the calibration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_records_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_records_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing process */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being manufactured */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing process */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the process */,
  "responsible_engineer" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer responsible for the process */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_processes_responsible_engineer FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_engineer") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_processes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturing process */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step in the process */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required for the step (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_steps_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process step */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource used */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., tool, material) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_resources_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES process_steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "qc_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality control check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA specialist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's record */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component with the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution was implemented */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_resolutions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES component_issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_resolutions_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the document version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES component_documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)
